zh: 项目诞生 — 一个空 index.html, 没工具、没数据、没后端
en: Project born — one empty index.html, no tools, no data, no backend

zh: WCA Statistics 数据管道上线 (Ruby + Jekyll + 周更 CI)
en: WCA Statistics pipeline launched (Ruby + Jekyll + weekly CI)

zh: i18n 框架雏形 + Solver/Trainers/Stats 三栏中英化 + 第一版 Landing
en: i18n framework; Solver/Trainers/Stats bilingual; first landing page

zh: WR Dominance 统计 + XXCross Trainer 集成
en: WR Dominance stat; XXCross Trainer imported

zh: WR stats 大重构 (13 stats → 1 Metric 页, 4 → 1 AoXR) + URL hash 状态 + 国旗
en: WR-stats refactor (13→1 metric page, 4→1 AoXR); URL hash state; country flags

zh: WR Newcomer 双源 (Single/Avg) + Dominance 项目选择
en: WR Newcomer dual-source; Dominance event picker

zh: 玻璃态卡片 + 魔方粒子动画
en: Glassmorphism cards; Rubik's-particle animation

zh: Stats UI 整体改 dropdown + segmented control
en: Stats UI overhaul — dropdowns + segmented controls

zh: Stats UI 从 Ruby 静态生成切到 JS-driven
en: Stats UI moves from Ruby static-gen to JS-driven

zh: 333mbf Mo3 统计 (mbf_average 页) 上线
en: 333mbf Mo3 stat page launched

zh: Upcoming Comps 追踪器上线 (顶级选手 + WR badge + 24h 缓存)
en: Upcoming Comps tracker launched (top cubers + WR badges + 24h cache)

zh: Recon Phase 1 MVP 上线 + WCA OAuth + Firestore + 中国大陆比赛接 cubing.com
en: Recon Phase 1 MVP; WCA OAuth + Firestore; China mainland comps via cubing.com

zh: Recon 增强 — TwistyPlayer + alg.cubing.net 链接 + STM/TPS + 比赛 dropdown + 选手主页
en: Recon polish — TwistyPlayer + alg.cubing.net links + STM/TPS + comp dropdown + user profile

zh: Recon 加 Single 列 + 无限滚动 + MM:SS 时间格式
en: Recon: Single col + infinite scroll + MM:SS time format

zh: Recon Phase 2 — cancelled 标记 + admin 编辑 modal + /recon/submit 独立页
en: Recon Phase 2 — cancelled badges + admin edit modal + /recon/submit page

zh: Recon 数据 Firestore → MariaDB + 写入鉴权 + 选手自动补全 + /recon/ID 详情页
en: Recon data Firestore → MariaDB; write auth; solver autocomplete; /recon/ID detail route

zh: legacy /recon PHP 列表 UI 收尾: colgroup 宽度 + 小 idx 列 + 缩小国旗与纪录角标 (上标对齐) + i18n 自动追加 ?lang= 到 URL + I18n.apply() 在数据渲染后再调修中英混排
en: Legacy /recon PHP list UI polish: colgroup widths, smaller idx column, shrunk flag icons + record badges (superscript alignment), i18n auto-appends ?lang= to URL, I18n.apply() after data render fixes mixed-language flash

zh: 全站 WCA 账号切换 + addedBy 字段追踪 recon 提交者
en: Site-wide WCA account switch; addedBy field tracks submitter

zh: Recon 提交者可编辑自己的条目
en: Recon authors can edit their own entries

zh: legacy /recon PHP 大改一天: db 新增 cube / reconer_id / group_id / recon_date / personCountry / wca comp_id 列 + 提交后富比赛卡片 + 编辑权限前后端双校验 (admin 或原提交者) + 详情页 URL 统一 /recon/detail/?id=X + sessionStorage 改 URL param + API 加载 + 浅深色 favicon + 清掉 10 个临时 migration endpoint + cleanForPlayer 剥括号 + WCA 登录后回到原页
en: Big legacy /recon PHP day: schema adds cube / reconer_id / group_id / recon_date / personCountry / wca comp_id columns + rich competition card on submit + edit-permission guard (admin or original adder) on both front+back + unify detail URL to /recon/detail/?id=X + sessionStorage → URL param + API load + light/dark favicon + drop 10 temp migration endpoints + cleanForPlayer strips parens + return-to-origin after WCA OAuth

zh: Recon 加 solution 列 + BLD exec/memo time 字段
en: Recon: solution column + BLD exec/memo time fields

zh: 本地优先 person 搜索 (Slack-style) + 自动 Single = Time + 比赛搜索接 cubing.com
en: Local-first person search (Slack-style); auto Single = Time; comp search uses cubing.com data

zh: HTH Calc 上线 + Recon 光标跟随 TwistyPlayer + YouTube/Bilibili 视频嵌入 + Alg-Trainers fork
en: HTH Calc launches; cursor-following TwistyPlayer; YouTube/Bilibili facade embeds; Alg-Trainers fork

zh: HTH Calc iOS-style 数字键盘 + 跨格删除 + PWA 品牌化
en: HTH Calc iOS-style numpad + cross-cell delete + PWA branding

zh: HTH Calc Canvas → DOM+SVG 全栈重构 + KDE 分布图 + 改名 /calc
en: HTH Calc Canvas → DOM+SVG full rewrite; KDE distribution chart; renamed /calc

zh: 1v1 Battle 上线 + csTimer 集成 (self-hosted) + 魔方记号虚拟键盘 (QWERTY + 长按变体 + 触发器栏)
en: 1v1 Battle launches; csTimer integrated (self-hosted); cube-notation virtual keyboard (QWERTY + long-press + trigger bar)

zh: Battle 大量增强 — 五彩纸屑 + Solo 模式 + 自定义背景 + Ao5 统计
en: Battle major polish — confetti + Solo mode + custom backgrounds + Ao5 stats

zh: 全站 WCA 登录 (顶角头像) + Battle 云同步成绩 + Calc 鼓轮 picker
en: Site-wide WCA login (top-corner avatar); Battle cloud-sync; Calc drum picker

zh: Calc 阈值徽章 + WR 五彩纸屑 + Battle Phase A/B/C 重构 + 改进度 slider
en: Calc threshold badges + WR confetti; Battle Phase A/B/C refactor; improvement slider

zh: Calc 柱形拖拽反推第 5 把 + 数字鼓轮 + 长按加速
en: Calc bar-drag reverse-calc 5th solve; numpad drum; long-press acceleration

zh: Calc 1000 轮蒙特卡洛中位数 + 帮助 modal + 个人 Ao100 模拟 (WCA 头像选择)
en: Calc 1000-round Monte Carlo median; help modal; personal Ao100 simulation via WCA avatar picker

zh: /viz 成绩分布页上线 (KDE / 直方图 / 山脊图 / 折线 + 多选手对比 + zoom/pan)
en: /viz distribution page launched (KDE / histogram / ridgeline / line; multi-player; zoom/pan)

zh: Viz 累积直方图 + tooltip 卡片化 + 折线 zoom/pan + Non-PR WR 统计
en: Viz cumulative histogram + card tooltip + line-chart zoom/pan; Non-PR WR stat

zh: React + TS monorepo 上线! 12 工具页迁过来 + cubing.js TwistyPlayer + Fastify backend + ZBLL/ZBLS Trainer
en: React+TS monorepo lands! 12 tools migrated + cubing.js TwistyPlayer + Fastify backend + ZBLL/ZBLS trainers

zh: Fastify → Hono 整体切换 (24h 内换栈) + /viz React 化 + Battle 子任务 React 化
en: Fastify → Hono full backend swap (within 24h); /viz React rewrite; Battle subtasks React port

zh: Recon React 化 (列表/详情/提交三页) + stats-build TS 重写 (Ruby 完全废)
en: Recon React port (list/detail/submit); stats-build rewritten in TS (Ruby removed)

zh: average_of 详情图表上线 + AoX History Dedup toggle
en: average_of detail charts; AoX History Dedup toggle

zh: 国旗加进 Person/Comp 链接 + cubing-icons 本地化 (CDN → public/vendor)
en: Country flags added to Person/Comp links; cubing-icons localized (CDN → public/vendor)

zh: WcaStatsPage 接连改 + wca_translations 加词 + 587 行 legacy wca_stats CSS 资产入仓 (为 03-30 大改造预热)
en: WcaStatsPage iterations + wca_translations growth + 587-line legacy wca_stats CSS assets land (warm-up for the 03-30 overhaul)

zh: /wca-stats 大改造: WcaStatsPage tab-bar 与 dedup toggle 拆开避免末尾圆角被破坏 + 指标 <4 用扁平 tab、≥4 折叠成 pill 下拉 + 点外部关闭 + 删 44 行数伪统计 + wr_current SQL 用 GROUP_CONCAT 拉 result_attempts 出 Details 列 + WrAoxr 标题改字面 AoXR + AverageOf 改 Rolling Average / 滚动平均 + 重跑 average_of / wr_aoxr / wr_ao{1..4}r / wr_current 数据
en: Major /wca-stats overhaul: WcaStatsPage splits tab-bar from dedup toggle so last-child corner radius survives + metrics <4 render as flat tabs, ≥4 collapse into pill dropdown with click-outside-close + drop the bogus 44-rows stat + wr_current SQL GROUP_CONCATs result_attempts into a new Details column + WrAoxr title becomes literal AoXR + AverageOf renamed to Rolling Average / 滚动平均 + regenerate average_of / wr_aoxr / wr_ao{1..4}r / wr_current JSON

zh: /app/pretext-demo 新页: Pretext Canvas 表格 demo (492 行 TSX + CSS) + wr_aoxr 日期排序 + solves details 格式修 + ao_rounds.ts / mbf_average 重构, 新加 format_date.ts core util + 重跑 wr_metric.json (58k 行) 与 comp_names_zh.json (+657 条) + compute_index.ts 索引重生
en: New /app/pretext-demo page: Pretext Canvas table demo (492-line TSX + CSS) + wr_aoxr date sorting fix + solves details format + ao_rounds.ts / mbf_average refactor with new format_date.ts core util + regenerate wr_metric.json (58k lines) and comp_names_zh.json (+657 entries) + compute_index.ts re-roll

zh: 整站结构大改 — trainer/ → core/、legacy/ 静态目录化 + JWT 路径 + LangToggle 抽组件 + i18n 系统补 113 行词条 + 459 行 CSS i18n 文案修 + Jekyll 收尾
en: Big restructure — trainer/ → core/, legacy/ dir, JWT paths, LangToggle component extracted, i18n adds 113 dictionary entries + 459-line CSS i18n sweep, Jekyll cleanup

zh: Battle 横向布局 + 1v1 实时对手时间 + ReconDetailPage 382 行大改 + recon TwistySection 75 行抽出 + recon_alg_utils 55 行
en: Battle landscape layout + opponent live time; 382-line ReconDetailPage rewrite; recon TwistySection extracted (75 lines); recon_alg_utils utilities

zh: Jekyll 构建彻底删除 + Landing 加 Blog 卡
en: Jekyll build fully removed; landing adds Blog card entry

zh: 删 _stats_build/ 121 个 Ruby 文件并把 database.yml 迁到 stats-build/ + legacy/ 重命名为 tools/ 并删 battle/calc/viz 老 HTML + 新增 Battle VsHistoryPanel 141 行 + Calc Numpad/InputGrid 大改
en: Delete 121-file Ruby _stats_build/ and move database.yml into stats-build/ + rename legacy/ → tools/ removing the battle/calc/viz HTML stubs + new 141-line Battle VsHistoryPanel + rewrite Calc Numpad and InputGrid

zh: /frame-count 从零诞生 819 行页面 + 800 行 CSS + mediainfo.js WASM 读元数据 + useFrameBuffer.ts 381 行 WebCodecs 帧缓冲 + 试 useReversedVideo 当晚就回滚
en: Birth of /frame-count: 819-line FrameCountPage + 800-line CSS + mediainfo.js WASM metadata reader + 381-line WebCodecs useFrameBuffer hook + tried-and-reverted useReversedVideo experiment

zh: Frame Count 接入 @ffmpeg/ffmpeg 32 MB core.wasm 做导出 + 改用 WebCodecs GPU 解码 → OffscreenCanvas crop → VideoEncoder → mp4-muxer 零丢帧硬件管线 + App.tsx catch-all 把未匹配路径重定向到 /blog/ + 收尾 commit 题为「可能存在丢帧」
en: Frame Count gets @ffmpeg/ffmpeg 32 MB core.wasm export + switch to WebCodecs GPU decode → OffscreenCanvas crop → VideoEncoder → mp4-muxer zero-frame-drop hardware pipeline + App.tsx catch-all route redirecting unmatched paths to /blog/ + day ends on a commit titled 可能存在丢帧 (suspected frame loss)

zh: Gemini 协作修丢帧: seek 改成两层渲染 — Tier 1 用 WebCodecs canvas 绝对帧索引 + prefetch 30 帧, Tier 2 降级到 video 容差;两层都用 +0.5 半帧安全偏移避开 A/V 同步漂移
en: Gemini collaboration on frame loss: rewrite seek as two-tier render — Tier 1 WebCodecs canvas absolute-frame index with 30-frame prefetch, Tier 2 fallback to video tolerance loop; both use a +0.5 half-frame safety offset to dodge A/V sync drift

zh: Frame Count 大日: A 键倒退去重帧 fix (Math.floor 替 Math.round + 暂停时屏蔽 RVFC 回调) + IndexedDB 记住最近 20 个 FileSystemDirectoryHandle MRU 目录 + 缩略图改两阶段 (先全 I 帧秒级出图, 再 stride 全解码补) + 300 MB 预算自适应分辨率 + 视频 wrapper 双指 pinch 缩放
en: Frame Count heavy day: A-key backward-step duplicate-frame fix (Math.floor instead of Math.round + guard RVFC callback while paused) + IndexedDB MRU memory of last 20 FileSystemDirectoryHandle dirs + two-phase thumbnail strategy (instant I-frame pass, then strided full-decode fill-in) + 300 MB-budget adaptive thumbnail resolution + two-finger pinch zoom on the video wrapper

zh: Frame Count 加 timestamp 起表帧反推法 (和 fps 公式并排展示) + 每个 Solve 自带 time 字段重构 + 时间轴上方 Mark 三角条 + Solve bands 跨段彩条 + mp4box samples 反推 fps 兜底 iOS Safari MediaInfo 加载失败
en: Frame Count adds timestamp-based start-frame back-calc method shown side-by-side with the fps formula + per-Solve time-field refactor + Mark triangle row above timeline + multi-Solve coloured bands across timeline + mp4box-sample-derived fps fallback for when MediaInfo WASM fails on iOS Safari

zh: Frame Count 新增 VideoInfoPanels.tsx 260 行 codec/audio/VFR 诊断面板 (HEVC profile 4 提示不支持、AAC/Opus 识别) + decoderDead/parseFailed UI 态 + 从文件名抓 \d+\.\d+ 自动填 Solve 1 时间
en: Frame Count adds 260-line VideoInfoPanels.tsx with codec/audio/VFR diagnostics (warns on unsupported HEVC profile 4, parses AAC/Opus) + decoderDead/parseFailed UI states + auto-fills Solve 1 time by extracting \d+\.\d+ from filename

zh: 新页面 /globe 落地 903 行 GlobePage 用 three.js 转动地球展未来比赛点 + LandingCubeHero 装饰 3D 魔方懒加载 cubing/twisty 循环 S' U' M' y2 + Landing 大改 (减重 -283/+155 行) + UpcomingCompsPage 724 行重构 + 加 countries-110m.geojson + WcaPersonPicker 提到 shared/
en: New /globe page lands as 903-line GlobePage rendering an interactive three.js earth of future comps + LandingCubeHero decorative auto-looping 3D cube (cubing/twisty lazy-loaded with S' U' M' y2) + Landing redesign (-283/+155 line slim-down) + 724-line UpcomingCompsPage overhaul + countries-110m.geojson asset + WcaPersonPicker hoisted to shared/

zh: Globe UI 迭代 372 行 + 加一次性 gen_all_comps.yml workflow 跑完就删 + stats.yml rebase 改非交互避免冲突时 commit 被吞 + gen_all_comps.ts builder 入库 + scripts/fetch_upcoming_comps.py 入库 + 删 .agent/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/ 3221 行废 skill
en: Globe UI iteration 372 lines + add one-shot gen_all_comps.yml workflow then remove after bootstrap + make stats.yml rebase non-interactive so the commit isn't dropped on conflict + check in gen_all_comps.ts builder and scripts/fetch_upcoming_comps.py + nuke 3221-line .agent/skills/ui-ux-pro-max/ dead skill tree

zh: Globe 大重写 949 行 + 银河系背景星图纹理 stars_milky_way_2k.jpg + 加 comp marker 聚合 + 加搜索功能 (368 行) + shared/wca_search 扩展 + deploy_core 白名单加 textures/ 和 countries-110m.geojson
en: Globe heavy rewrite 949 lines + stars_milky_way_2k.jpg Milky Way background texture + competition marker clustering + 368-line search functionality + shared/wca_search expansion + deploy_core asset whitelist now ships textures/ and countries-110m.geojson

zh: 新统计 world_records_by_country (stats-build SQL + 1892 行 JSON 产出) + Globe 接入 WCA stats 模式 + scripts/fetch_comp_names_zh.py 重写 + 加 cn_disputed_patches.geojson 修正中印/中尼争议边界 + 落 5 个 .claude/skills/ (cn-comp-names / comp-data-schema / cuber-name-display / deploy-public-asset / stats-build)
en: New world_records_by_country statistic (stats-build SQL + 1892-line JSON output) + Globe gains WCA-stats mode + scripts/fetch_comp_names_zh.py rewrite + add cn_disputed_patches.geojson fixing Sino-Indian/Sino-Nepalese disputed borders + land 5 .claude/skills/ (cn-comp-names / comp-data-schema / cuber-name-display / deploy-public-asset / stats-build)

zh: 抽出 utils/date_range.ts 紧凑日期区间 + utils/flag.tsx 国旗组件 (TW 特判) + 落 comp-date-range / country-flag 两个 skill + Globe 继续迭代
en: Extract utils/date_range.ts compact-range helper + utils/flag.tsx flag component with the TW special-case + land comp-date-range and country-flag skills + another Globe iteration

zh: 新页面 /scramble-stats 落地: ScrambleStatsPage 389 行 + DiscreteHistogram 208 行离散直方图 + 新包 core/packages/scramble-stats-build/ (CSV → distribution.json 240 行 builder) + scramble-stats-build skill
en: New /scramble-stats page lands: 389-line ScrambleStatsPage + 208-line DiscreteHistogram + new core/packages/scramble-stats-build/ package (240-line builder turning CSV into distribution.json) + scramble-stats-build skill

zh: /alg 公式库 Phase 1-5 (docx → SPA 数据 + 落地页 + Algorithms 卡)
en: /alg library launched (docx → SPA data + landing page + Algorithms card)

zh: 新页喷涌日! /sites 站点导航初版 (SitesPage + categories.ts + 2539 行 sites.ts 数据 + 377 行 sites.css) + Mosaic 魔方马赛克生成器 (port from Roman-/mosaic) + /alg 框架初版 (AlgCategoryPage / AlgIndexPage) + /nemesizer 初版 (PersonSearch / PersonCell / NemesizerBrand + 233 行 design spec) + WheelPicker 354 行抽组件 + RecordBadge 抽组件 + Calc Drum 用 WheelPicker 重写 + DonateModal 加支付宝/微信码 + LandingPage 加 beian-badge.png + FrameCountPage 395 行重构
en: Page eruption day! /sites navigation v1 (SitesPage + categories.ts + 2539-line sites.ts dataset + 377-line CSS) + Mosaic generator (port from Roman-/mosaic) + /alg scaffold (AlgCategoryPage / AlgIndexPage) + /nemesizer v1 (PersonSearch / PersonCell / NemesizerBrand + 233-line design spec) + 354-line WheelPicker extraction + RecordBadge extraction + Calc Drum rebuilt on WheelPicker + DonateModal adds Alipay/WeChat QR + LandingPage adds beian-badge.png + 395-line FrameCountPage rewrite

zh: Nemesizer 上线 (port speedsolving wiki) + /wca-stats/persons 查询页 + /wb 全球排名 + BattlePage 183 行大改 + VsHistoryPanel iteration + LangToggle + deploy 链路调
en: Nemesizer launches (port from speedsolving wiki); /wca-stats/persons lookup; /wb world rankings; 183-line BattlePage rework; VsHistoryPanel iteration; LangToggle; deploy pipeline tweaks

zh: /timer 完整 TS 重写 (Round 1A-1E: Kociemba + 2D 预览 + 直方图 + cstimer JSON I/O + 全项目)
en: /timer TS rewrite (Rounds 1A-1E: Kociemba / 2D preview / histogram / cstimer I/O / full events)

zh: /timer 史诗一天 (116 commits)! BLD/分阶段 timing + 智能立方蓝牙 + 3D 预览 + WCA inspection + share URL + 全套移动适配 + CFOP 多阶段 + cstimer 算法引擎 port + 5 个蓝牙协议 + shared components 第一波 (EventIcon / EventSelect / RecordSelect / RecordBadge 抽出) + WcaAuth 组件 + AuthCallbackPage 改造
en: /timer epic day (116 commits)! BLD/stage timing + smartcube BT + 3D preview + WCA inspection + share URL + mobile polish + CFOP multi-stage + cstimer gSolver port + 5 BLE protocols + shared-components first wave (EventIcon / EventSelect / RecordSelect / RecordBadge extracted) + WcaAuth component + AuthCallbackPage rework

zh: Top10 history 视频导出 + ListSelect 通用组件 + wb-build scraper 与 world_bests.json (+300 行) + recon-toolbar 调试
en: Top-10 history video export; ListSelect generic component; wb-build scraper + world_bests.json (+300 lines); recon-toolbar debugging

zh: Recon SameRound 自动带入 (WCA + cubing.com fetch + 列过滤) + Battle 每选手 event picker
en: Recon SameRound autofill (WCA + cubing.com fetch + column filters); Battle per-player event picker

zh: 四个新模块齐发: /prediction 项目理论极限 + 预测 (PredictionPage 667 行 + EventSection 317 行 + charts.tsx 315 行 + events.ts) + /calendar 列表视图 + 范围过滤 + 每项目轮次 chip + ClearButton 抽组件统一所有 input 清除 + CuberSearchInput 新组件 207 行 + DonateModal 接 wca_api + ReconDetailPage 351 行大改
en: Four-module day: /prediction event theoretical-limits + forecasts (667-line PredictionPage + 317-line EventSection + 315-line charts.tsx + events.ts) + /calendar list view + range filter + per-event round chips + ClearButton extraction unifies all input clears + new 207-line CuberSearchInput + DonateModal wired to wca_api + 351-line ReconDetailPage rework

zh: /algdb 上线 (scrape from speedcubedb) + Recon submit cubedb.net 风格自动补全 + cubing.js cube3 包装 + 阶段识别 + /prediction 模块完成 (TheoreticalLimitView + 615 行 theoretical_limits + 接入 WcaStatsPage) + f2l_lookup.ts 162 行第一版指纹查表 + recon_alg_utils 重构
en: /algdb launches (scrape from speedcubedb); cubedb.net-style autofill in recon submit; cubing.js cube3 wrapper + stage detector; /prediction module completed (TheoreticalLimitView + 615-line theoretical_limits + wired into WcaStatsPage); 162-line f2l_lookup.ts fingerprint table v1; recon_alg_utils refactor

zh: recon autofill 升级: OLL/PLL 指纹查表 (228 algs × 4 AUF) + pscross 阶段 + solvedPairs frame-invariant + algdb MiniCube → VisualCube 替换 + CubeVirtualKeyboard 长按变体 (U/D/F/L/R/B → 单层/双层/x2/x')
en: recon autofill upgrade: OLL/PLL fingerprint lookup tables (228 algs × 4 AUFs) + pscross stage + frame-invariant solvedPairs + algdb MiniCube → VisualCube swap + CubeVirtualKeyboard long-press face-move variants (single/wide/×2/prime)

zh: VisualCube 服务化 (esbuild + Node 渲染 + /v1/visualcube.svg + service worker) + @cuberoot/visualcube PHP-port TS 包入仓 (7300+ 行) + /analyze CFOP 分析器 port + Sq1/Megaminx/Pyraminx/Skewb 接 sr-puzzlegen + TwistySection 通用化提升 + ColFilter 加升降排序按钮 + ReconSubmitPage 453 行大改加 Shuffle/randomScrambleForReconEvent
en: VisualCube as a service (esbuild + Node + /v1/visualcube.svg + SW); @cuberoot/visualcube TS package (PHP port, 7300+ lines) lands; /analyze CFOP analyzer port; Sq1/Megaminx/Pyraminx/Skewb via sr-puzzlegen; TwistySection generalised + hoisted; ColFilter gains asc/desc sort buttons; 453-line ReconSubmitPage rework with Shuffle/randomScrambleForReconEvent

zh: OnThisDayModal 历年此日弹窗 + Patterns 库支持 NxN (3..7) + Patterns/Today 重排 + CalcPage 默认空白 (移除自动 rand-fill, 改 World TOP 2 按钮触发) + visualcube masking 改字符串 mask 按 cubeSize 索引 (告别仅 3x3 限制) + /visualcube/stages mask cheatsheet 页 + AlgCategoryPage F2L 四 ori (FR/FL/BL/BR) + calc-interactions.mjs 端到端 test
en: OnThisDayModal calendar popup + Patterns library supports NxN (3..7) + Patterns/Today reorg + CalcPage starts blank (auto rand-fill removed, World TOP 2 button now opt-in) + visualcube masking switched to per-cubeSize string maps (no longer 3x3-only) + /visualcube/stages mask cheatsheet + AlgCategoryPage F2L four oris (FR/FL/BL/BR) + calc-interactions.mjs end-to-end test

zh: 大重构日! MariaDB → PostgreSQL 13 + 41 个 alg JSON → DB + 宝塔/PHP/WP 全卸
en: Great Refactor day! MariaDB → PostgreSQL 13; 41 alg JSONs → DB; baota/PHP/WP wiped

zh: /code 编程语言入门站上线! 22294 行新增 (CIntro / CppIntro / GoIntro / KotlinIntro / CodeLandingPage / CompareAo5Page) + Alg admin DnD 排序 + X-Admin-Key 通道 + AlgPlayer / CubeKeyboardSection 抽组件 + FormulaInput 新组件 + AdminCaseEditor 重构 (alg-input 体系第一版) + /calendar 紧凑国旗模式 + UpcomingCompsPage 加日历视图 + country 输入 + API 全站走 api.cuberoot.me
en: /code programming-language intro hub launches! 22294 lines added (CIntro / CppIntro / GoIntro / KotlinIntro / CodeLandingPage / CompareAo5Page); Alg admin drag-reorder + X-Admin-Key channel; AlgPlayer / CubeKeyboardSection extracted; new FormulaInput; AdminCaseEditor rewrite (alg-input system v1); /calendar compact flag mode; UpcomingCompsPage gains calendar view + country input; API routes under api.cuberoot.me

zh: FormulaInput → AlgInput + admin 全屏 + caret 同步 + /wca-stats/historical 上线 + 7 个 cubing.pro 风格统计页 + /scramble/solver (cubeopt-wasm port) + 服务端渲染 unfolded-net SVG + colpi 记忆训练页初版 (ColpiPage 314 行 + colpi.css 383 行, 后续同日扩到 584 行) + PillToggle 抽组件 + LanguagePicker + colpi 多语种 scraper 与 NDJSON→SQL 管线 + JavaIntroPage / JavaScriptIntroPage / MojoIntroPage + longest_streak_of_world_records 重算 2532 行 + 大删旧训练页 (CubeView / CaseSelectPage / HomePage / OllTrainingPage / StatsPage -4713 行)
en: FormulaInput → AlgInput; admin fullscreen + caret-synced; /wca-stats/historical launched; 7 cubing.pro stat pages; /scramble/solver (cubeopt-wasm port); server-rendered unfolded-net SVGs; colpi memory-training page v1 (314-line ColpiPage + 383-line CSS, expanded to 584-line diff same day) + PillToggle extraction + LanguagePicker + multilingual colpi scraper with NDJSON→SQL pipeline; new JavaIntroPage / JavaScriptIntroPage / MojoIntroPage; longest_streak_of_world_records recomputed (2532-line diff); legacy trainer pages removed (CubeView / CaseSelectPage / HomePage / OllTrainingPage / StatsPage, -4713 lines)

zh: /scramble/gen 接 cubing.js (tnoodle 等价) + QuickMode / TNoodleMode + tnoodle PDF 导出 + sq1_svg.ts 新增 + ClockColorPicker + ProgressButton 抽组件 + visualcube InteractiveCubeNet 大幅扩展 + /scramble/solver ScrambleSolverPage 大改 + /wca-stats/persons 重构 (8 sections + 月级 rank 图) + /globe cuber 柱状密度 + colpi CSS
en: /scramble/gen swaps to cubing.js (tnoodle-equivalent) + QuickMode/TNoodleMode + tnoodle-style PDF; new sq1_svg.ts; ClockColorPicker + ProgressButton extractions; visualcube InteractiveCubeNet major expansion; ScrambleSolverPage heavy rework; /wca-stats/persons full rebuild (8 sections + monthly rank chart); /globe cuber pillar density mode; colpi CSS

zh: /site 后端化 (nav_sites + admin 编辑) + 自写 39 行 schema migration runner + ssh keepalive + psql -e 进度 + PuzzleSVG / WcaEventSelector 抽组件 + pyraminx_svg / skewb_svg 各自手画 SVG + tnoodle PDF 中文支持 (内嵌 wqy-microhei.ttf + build_tnoodle_i18n.mjs) + healthcheck.yml workflow + ClockColorPicker + ProgressButton + persons ByEventView 调整
en: /site backed by API (nav_sites + admin editor); 39-line self-hosted schema migration runner; ssh keepalive + psql -e progress; PuzzleSVG / WcaEventSelector extractions; hand-drawn pyraminx_svg / skewb_svg; tnoodle PDF Chinese support (embedded wqy-microhei.ttf + build_tnoodle_i18n.mjs); healthcheck.yml workflow; ClockColorPicker + ProgressButton; persons ByEventView tweaks

zh: 史诗日! /code 拆 /code/language (+9 页 C#/Ruby/PHP/Lua/Haskell + HTML/CSS/Bash/SQL) + /code/architecture 重写图文长版 + /scramble/gen Import 模式 + Recon BLD memo/exec + dev.cuberoot.me 反向隧道上线 (frp + 强制 TLS) + HMR 双→三入口
en: Epic day! /code split into /code/language (+9 pages: C#/Ruby/PHP/Lua/Haskell + HTML/CSS/Bash/SQL); /code/architecture illustrated long-form rewrite; /scramble/gen Import mode; Recon BLD memo/exec; dev.cuberoot.me reverse tunnel live (frp + forced TLS); HMR dual → triple entry
